determinism.detail: 107 canonical GameState snapshots matched across two processes

acs.name: skier entity with position state
acs.detail: init returned skier x=0 y=0 speed=1 mode=skiing

acs.name: slope scrolls while skiing
acs.detail: distance increased to 16.6 after 10 neutral steps

acs.name: slope wraps horizontally
acs.detail: observed right-edge wrap at step 61: x 60→-59

acs.name: seeded obstacle field
acs.detail: same seed matched; different seed differed; 60 snapshots had obstacles

acs.name: tree/stump collision crashes and halts
acs.detail: navigated into a tree/stump and crashed at tick 31 and distance halted at 90.52

acs.name: crash recovery returns to skiing
acs.detail: crashed at tick 31, recovered by tick 34

acs.name: straight downhill acceleration to a cap
acs.detail: speed rose from 1 to cap near 7

acs.name: ramp causes airborne then landing
acs.detail: navigated onto a ramp, airborne at tick 40, landed by tick 45

acs.name: style changes on landing and crash
acs.detail: landing increased style above 0; crash deducted 0→-5

acs.name: monster contact eats skier and ends game
acs.detail: skier eaten and gameOver=true at tick 331

acs.name: reset restores state and seed stream
acs.detail: reset cleared state and matched fresh seeded stream over 30 snapshots
